title: PMS Plush Hamish Highland Cow – 25 cm Soft Toy with Weighted Beanies – Cute & Cuddly Stuffed Animal – Scottish Highland Cow Teddy for Kids & Adults
features: ADORABLE HIGHLAND COW DESIGN – Features a fluffy coat, curved horns, and a friendly face, capturing the charm of the Scottish Highlands
SOFT & HUGGABLE – Made from high-quality plush fabric that is gentle on skin and perfect for cuddles and playtime
WEIGHTED FOR COMFORT – Contains 50g of beanies in the body, giving a slightly weighted feel and helping the plush sit upright
PERFECT SIZE – Measuring 25 cm tall and weighing approximately 240g, an ideal size for children to carry and hug
GREAT GIFT IDEA – A thoughtful present for birthdays, Christmas, or animal lovers of any age, suitable for both kids and adults
description: Meet Hamish, the adorable Highland cow plush that is sure to become a favourite companion for children and adults alike. Measuring 25 cm tall, this soft toy captures the charm of the iconic Scottish Highland cow with its fluffy coat, curved horns, and friendly face. Made from high-quality, super-soft fabric, Hamish is designed for cuddles and comfort, making it perfect for bedtime snuggles, playtime adventures, or as a comforting companion. Inside, 50g of weighted beanies give this plush a satisfying, slightly weighted feel, providing extra comfort when held and helping it sit upright when displayed. Its detailed design and premium materials make it a wonderful decorative piece as well as a playful toy. Ideal as a thoughtful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or special occasions, this Highland cow teddy is perfect for children who love animals, as well as adults who want a cute keepsake to remind them of the Scottish Highlands. Whether placed on a bed, chair, or nursery shelf, Hamish adds a warm and cheerful touch to any space.
